nodes_added.purpose: Convert the feathered inpaint mask from node 13 into a previewable image.
Save the mask preview alongside the normal inpaint composite output.

findings.mask_localization: Pass: mask preview is localized to small facial detail regions and excludes the background, hair mass, clothing, and frame edges.
findings.protected_regions: Pass: visible eyes and mouth are not covered by the active white mask regions, matching the no-mouth v4 intent.
findings.mask_shape: Pass with notes: mask covers forehead and cheek/nose-adjacent detail zones with simple rounded regions; it is diagnostic and intentionally narrow rather than a semantic full-face mask.
findings.preview_integrity: Pass: preview output is a valid 768x768 PNG and was emitted by the new MaskToImage/SaveImage branch.

whole_image_findings.prompt_alignment: Pass: subtle photoreal skin-detail refinement with preserved portrait composition.
whole_image_findings.face_identity: Pass with notes: identity, face shape, gaze, and lip color remain stable for local iteration; edited skin remains slightly polished.
whole_image_findings.eyes: Pass: eyes remain coherent and are not overwritten by the mask-preview workflow change.
whole_image_findings.mouth_teeth: Pass: closed mouth remains natural; no teeth artifacts or mouth-region overwrite.
whole_image_findings.hair_clothing_background: Pass: hair mass, blazer, shirt, and background remain stable and outside the mask edit.
whole_image_findings.mask_boundary_effect: Pass with notes: no gray-mask or full-face replacement regression; mask-region skin is still slightly smoother than surrounding skin.
whole_image_findings.artifacts: No blocking image artifact observed in the local diagnostic run.

not_certified_reasons: This local run proves the mask preview branch and local composite output only.
Target-runtime object_info/path/hash/input proof, bounded generation, pullback, technical QA, and strict whole-image visual QA remain required before promotion.
The remaining local quality note is slightly smoother skin in the edited mask region.
next_action: Keep the mask preview branch in the inpaint lane. Continue local-first with output handoff path work or another named implementation/QA task; do not certify inpaint until target-runtime proof passes.
